title: Design System: Hirslanden — Variant D (Confident display)

variant.role: Different captured trait amplified — display typography
variant.bet: Metropolis pushed into a confident editorial display scale on a strict modular grid; the 16/300/3000 scale story rendered as a typographic proof block.
variant.amplifies: Display-typography amplification (what-if #1), in service of Design Principles 4 (one quiet voice, one accent) and 5 (institutional proof, plainly stated).
variant.differentiatingToken: type-scale ratio 1.333 (perfect fourth), Display clamp up to 4.21rem, tight display line-height 1.08, strict 12-col grid with 24px gutters, proof block
variant.motion: static — no count-up/reveal; scale and grid carry confidence at rest; NO motion register

hirslanden-blue.note: action + sparing single-numeral emphasis; never the whole proof block

text-warm-dark.note: display headings and proof numerals — warm even at large size

display.purpose: Hero line and proof numerals — Metropolis 700, perfect-fourth scale.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Content cards only; the proof block stays flat with hairline grid rules.

grid.note: Strict modular grid; nav, proof block, cards, and search all snap to columns.

typeScale.note: Perfect fourth; replaces captured ad-hoc 42/34/22 (1.235/1.545 disagreeing).

header.purpose: Wordmark + nav + search + utility bar, grid-aligned; reachable emergency path.

footer.purpose: Group blurb, social, link mega-menu, prominent emergency 144.

proof-block.purpose: Institutional scale story (16/300+/3000+) as a large typographic statement on the grid.
proof-block.siteWideConstraint: Set as Display numerals with Label captions; never animated; never recolored across all three.

motifs.visibleGrid: hairline #e2dfdb rules expressing the 12-column modular grid
motifs.warmPhotography: supporting role — photography sits within grid cells, not full-bleed

voice.register: formal Swiss-German Sie; institutional scale stated plainly — amplified as typographic proof
dos: Do state scale as numerals, captioned plainly (Privatkliniken / Kompetenzzentren / Ärztinnen und Ärzte).
Do keep headings declarative and confident.
Do let the grid express the institution's order.
donts: Don't boast — the numbers are proof, not a brag.
Don't decorate the proof block with color or motion.
Don't add a second typeface for contrast.

iaPriorities.evidence: PRODUCT.md Product Purpose + footer recite '16 Privatkliniken, über 300 Kompetenzzentren, über 3000 Ärztinnen und Ärzte'; currently footer prose
warm grounds + warm text + human photography (supporting role here)
single family Metropolis — the protagonist of this variant; single accent #0094d4

divergence.cCliffCheck: Display amplification is anchored to a captured trait (the single geometric sans currently rendered ad-hoc), NOT to size-as-personality. The 1.333 ratio is a disciplined modular scale, not a 120pt vanity slider. sectionPadding held at 64px floor — confidence comes from type scale + grid, not from padding-as-personality. Passes C-cliff.
brand_faithful_inversions: #ffffff retained as card / proof-block ground (brand decision). 'No pure white' inverted per brand-faithful direction.
Hex token format retained. OKLCH applies to new authoring only.
Sharp 0px corners retained on cards/inputs/primary buttons. 'Modern means rounded' reflex inverted.
Saturated #0094d4 retained as primary action color. Tinted-neutral-primary reflex inverted.
#f43a11 retained as reserved color for the 144 affordance only. Spread-accent reflex inverted.
Warm #534c46 retained for large display headings (agent-default would reach for near-black at display size for 'punch'); warm-faithful inverted.
divergence.antiToolboxAudit: 0 unjustified hits. The visible grid is justified by the display-typography bet (grid is structure for the type), not decoration.
divergence.motionRegister: none — static variant; explicitly no count-up on proof numerals

components.name: Proof Block
components.description: The institutional scale story as large typographic numerals on the grid.
components.html:
16Privatkliniken
300+Kompetenzzentren
3000+Ärztinnen und Ärzte
components.css: .ds-proof { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; border-top: 1px solid #e2dfdb; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2dfdb; padding: 40px 0; font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; } .ds-proof-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-proof-num { font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 4.21rem); line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #534c46; } .ds-proof-cap { font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #72665b; }

components.name: Display Headline
components.css: .ds-display { font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 4.21rem); line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #534c46; max-width: 16ch; margin: 0; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0094d4; color: #fff; padding: 12px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 0; font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.18s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0083bd; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0094d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Variant D amplifies Metropolis itself: a confident perfect-fourth display scale (1.333) on a strict 12-column grid, with the 16/300/3000 scale story rendered as a large typographic proof block instead of footer prose. Type carries the institutional authority; color and photography stay pinned and supporting.
keyCharacteristics: Confident display scale, ratio 1.333 on Metropolis 700
Pinned palette stays quiet; type is the protagonist

rules.name: The Type-Carries-It Rule
rules.body: Authority is built with display type on a grid, not with more color. Blue stays at action coverage.

rules.name: The Reserved-Red Rule
rules.body: #f43a11 is the 144 number only — never to emphasize a proof numeral.

rules.name: The Perfect-Fourth Rule
rules.body: All sizes derive from a single 1.333 ratio; the ad-hoc 42/34/22 set is retired.

rules.name: The Proof-Block Rule
rules.body: 16/300/3000 are Display numerals with Label captions on the grid — read as type, not buried prose.

rules.name: The Grid-Is-Structure Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy comes from grid position and type scale, not shadows.

dos: Do set headings in a confident 1.333 display scale on Metropolis 700.
Do render 16/300/3000 as a typographic proof block on the grid.
Do keep color pinned and quiet.
donts: Don't add count-up animation or any cinematic motion register.
